queries.question: For every marketing campaign, list the approach used.
queries.sql: select marketing_campaigns.campaign_name , approaches.approach_value from Marketing_Campaigns_Approaches join Approaches on Marketing_Campaigns_Approaches.approach_id = Approaches.id join Marketing_Campaigns on Marketing_Campaigns_Approaches.marketing_campaign_id = Marketing_Campaigns.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?campaign_name ?approach_value WHERE {
  ?marketing_campaigns_approaches a :Marketing_Campaigns_Approaches .
  ?approaches a :Approaches .
  ?marketing_campaigns_approaches p:hasApproaches ?approaches .
  ?marketing_campaigns a :Marketing_Campaigns .
  ?marketing_campaigns_approaches p:hasMarketing_Campaigns ?marketing_campaigns .
  ?marketing_campaigns p:campaign_name ?campaign_name .
  ?approaches p:approach_value ?approach_value .
}

queries.question: What approach do all marketing campaigns have in common?
queries.sql: SELECT Approaches.approach_value  from Marketing_Campaigns_Approaches join Approaches on Marketing_Campaigns_Approaches.approach_id = Approaches.id join Marketing_Campaigns on Marketing_Campaigns_Approaches.marketing_campaign_id = Marketing_Campaigns.id   GROUP BY Marketing_Campaigns_Approaches.approach_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Marketing_Campaigns_Approaches.marketing_campaign_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Marketing_Campaigns)

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the approach each marketing campaign uses.
